title: UPSM-263 Miss Universe JAPAN Finalist Debut Fujisaki Ai - Ai Fujisaki
overview: Uncompromising in her pursuit of beauty, Ai Fujisaki lives up to her title! With an incredibly impressive resume, she's finally arrived at UP'S! This is the ultimate first-time nude married woman AV debut! A Miss Universe Japan finalist, Miss Shonan Photogenic, Asian Beauty Contest, and more, this miraculous newlywed has left a dazzling mark in many famous contests. At just 29 years old, she's a stunning beauty! Such presence...
